summary: Fifteen military equipment targets assessed, all confirmed with NO DAMAGE. The scene depicts a column of armored vehicles moving across a dusty, arid terrain, kicking up significant dust clouds as they advance in formation. The functional impact is consistent with operational movement, as all assessed vehicles show no visible damage and are actively engaged in coordinated transit.
